data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the service menu displayed on Google.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the service menu being displayed on Google, but there is no evidence in the prior steps that confirms this requirement has been satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for the service menu to be displayed, yet does not provide any concrete evidence of its implementation or status. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of service menu displayed on Google.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
